questionText: Seu colega terminou um grande projeto com sucesso. Como você o parabeniza de forma apropriada?
correctAnswer: Congratulations on completing the project! You did an excellent job.
options: Congratulations on completing the project! You did an excellent job.
You finished the project. It was okay, I guess.
The project is done now. What's next?
I'm happy the project is finally over.

questionText: Você precisa pedir uma extensão de prazo para entregar um relatório. O que você diz ao seu gerente?
correctAnswer: Could I have a bit more time to complete the report? I need another week.
options: Could I have a bit more time to complete the report? I need another week.
I can't finish the report on time, sorry.
The deadline is impossible. You need to change it.
I might be able to deliver it late, maybe.

questionText: Seu gerente sugere uma estratégia que você discorda. Como você expressa sua opinião respeitosamente?
correctAnswer: I appreciate your suggestion, but I have some concerns. Could we discuss the risks involved?
options: I appreciate your suggestion, but I have some concerns. Could we discuss the risks involved?
That's a bad idea. We shouldn't do it.
I don't agree with you at all.
Your idea won't work. Everyone knows that.

questionText: Você precisa informar seu gerente que não consegue atender uma reunião importante. Como você comunica isso?
correctAnswer: I'm afraid I won't be able to attend the meeting tomorrow. Could we reschedule?
options: I'm afraid I won't be able to attend the meeting tomorrow. Could we reschedule?
I'm not coming to the meeting.
The meeting doesn't work for me.
I can't make it, sorry.

questionText: Um cliente está insatisfeito com o serviço. Como você começa a resolver a situação?
correctAnswer: I understand your frustration. Let's work together to find a solution.
options: I understand your frustration. Let's work together to find a solution.
This is not our problem. You should complain to someone else.
There's nothing I can do about it.
You're overreacting to this issue.

questionText: Você quer oferecer ajuda a um colega que está sobrecarregado. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: I can see you're quite busy. Would you like some help with any of these tasks?
options: I can see you're quite busy. Would you like some help with any of these tasks?
You look stressed. You should relax more.
This is too much work for one person.
I could help, but I'm also busy.

questionText: Você está em uma entrevista de emprego e perguntam sobre suas fraquezas. Como você responde?
correctAnswer: I tend to be a perfectionist, which sometimes affects my productivity. I'm working to improve this by setting realistic deadlines.
options: I tend to be a perfectionist, which sometimes affects my productivity. I'm working to improve this by setting realistic deadlines.
I don't really have any weaknesses.
I'm not sure. What do you think?
I'm bad at many things. Where do I start?

questionText: Você precisa clarificar uma instrução confusa do seu gerente. Como você pede explicações?
correctAnswer: Just to clarify, could you explain what you mean by that? I want to make sure I understand correctly.
options: Just to clarify, could you explain what you mean by that? I want to make sure I understand correctly.
That doesn't make any sense.
What are you talking about?
I don't get it. Say it again.

questionText: Um colega cometeu um erro que afeta seu trabalho. Como você aborda a situação diplomaticamente?
correctAnswer: I noticed there's an issue with the document. Could we discuss how to fix it together?
options: I noticed there's an issue with the document. Could we discuss how to fix it together?
You made a mistake! You always do this.
Your work is full of errors.
This is completely wrong. You need to redo it.

questionText: Você quer sugerir uma mudança no processo de trabalho. Como você apresenta sua ideia?
correctAnswer: I have an idea that might improve our workflow. Would you be interested in hearing about it?
options: I have an idea that might improve our workflow. Would you be interested in hearing about it?
Our current process is terrible. We need to change everything.
I have a better way to do things.
The way we work now is inefficient.

questionText: Você está em um evento de networking e quer iniciar uma conversa profissional. Como você começa?
correctAnswer: Hi, I'm Sarah. I work in marketing. What's your area of expertise?
options: Hi, I'm Sarah. I work in marketing. What's your area of expertise?
What do you do?
This event is pretty crowded, isn't it?
I haven't seen you before.

questionText: Você recebe feedback crítico durante uma avaliação de desempenho. Como você responde profissionalmente?
correctAnswer: Thank you for the feedback. I appreciate the specific examples. How can I improve in these areas?
options: Thank you for the feedback. I appreciate the specific examples. How can I improve in these areas?
That's not fair. I don't agree with you.
I don't think that's accurate.
Everyone else does it the same way.

questionText: Você precisa se desculpar por um erro no trabalho. Como você faz isso apropriadamente?
correctAnswer: I apologize for the mistake. I understand the impact it had, and I've taken steps to prevent it from happening again.
options: I apologize for the mistake. I understand the impact it had, and I've taken steps to prevent it from happening again.
Sorry, I messed up.
It was just a small mistake.
These things happen to everyone.

questionText: Você quer recusar diplomaticamente uma atribuição que não pode fazer. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: I appreciate the opportunity, but I'm currently at capacity with my existing projects. Could we discuss this at a later time?
options: I appreciate the opportunity, but I'm currently at capacity with my existing projects. Could we discuss this at a later time?
No, I can't do it.
I'm too busy for this.
That's not my job.

questionText: Um novo membro da equipe chegou. Como você o acolhe e oferece suporte?
correctAnswer: Welcome to the team! If you need any help settling in or have questions, please don't hesitate to ask.
options: Welcome to the team! If you need any help settling in or have questions, please don't hesitate to ask.
Good luck, you'll need it here.
You're the new person.
I hope you know how to do your job.

questionText: Você está preparando um discurso para apresentar resultados do projeto. Como você começa para engajar a audiência?
correctAnswer: Thank you all for being here. Today I'd like to share the results of our recent project and discuss the key lessons we learned.
options: Thank you all for being here. Today I'd like to share the results of our recent project and discuss the key lessons we learned.
Okay, here's what we did.
Listen up, everyone. This is important.
I'm going to tell you about our project now.

questionText: Você está em uma reunião e deseja contribuir com uma opinião contrária. Como você introduz seu ponto de vista?
correctAnswer: I see your point, but I'd like to offer a different perspective on this matter.
options: I see your point, but I'd like to offer a different perspective on this matter.
That's wrong.
I completely disagree with you.
You're mistaken about this.

questionText: Um cliente solicita um serviço que está fora do escopo do seu projeto. Como você comunica isso diplomaticamente?
correctAnswer: I understand what you're asking for. That's slightly outside our current scope, but let's discuss if it's something we can accommodate.
options: I understand what you're asking for. That's slightly outside our current scope, but let's discuss if it's something we can accommodate.
We can't do that.
That's not what we agreed to.
You're asking for too much.

questionText: Você precisa negociar um prazo mais realista com seu gerente. Como você aborda a conversa?
correctAnswer: I want to be transparent about the timeline. Based on the project scope, I believe we'll need at least six weeks to deliver quality results.
options: I want to be transparent about the timeline. Based on the project scope, I believe we'll need at least six weeks to deliver quality results.
Six weeks is the minimum. You can't expect it faster.
The deadline you set is impossible.
I'll try to do it in three weeks, but I can't promise anything.

questionText: Você está colaborando com um colega sobre uma estratégia diferente. Como você busca consenso?
correctAnswer: We have different approaches here. Can we find a middle ground that incorporates the strengths of both our ideas?
options: We have different approaches here. Can we find a middle ground that incorporates the strengths of both our ideas?
My idea is better than yours.
We should do it my way.
Your approach won't work.

questionText: Você está preparando para uma entrevista de promoção. Como você articula suas aspirações?
correctAnswer: I'm interested in taking on more responsibility and contributing to the strategic direction of the department.
options: I'm interested in taking on more responsibility and contributing to the strategic direction of the department.
I want more money.
I deserve a promotion.
I'm tired of doing this job.

questionText: Um colega pede uma recomendação pessoal para outra empresa. Como você responde se não pode fornecer uma recomendação positiva?
correctAnswer: I appreciate you thinking of me, but I don't feel I know your work well enough to provide a strong recommendation.
options: I appreciate you thinking of me, but I don't feel I know your work well enough to provide a strong recommendation.
No, I won't recommend you.
You're not qualified enough.
I don't think that's a good idea for you.

questionText: Você precisa comunicar más notícias sobre atrasos no projeto ao gerente. Como você estrutura essa conversa?
correctAnswer: I need to inform you that we've encountered some challenges that will impact our timeline. I've already developed a plan to minimize the delay.
options: I need to inform you that we've encountered some challenges that will impact our timeline. I've already developed a plan to minimize the delay.
The project is behind schedule.
Everything went wrong.
We're not on track and I don't know what to do.

questionText: Em uma reunião de equipe, você quer elogiar o trabalho de um colega sem fazer parecer feito na hora. Como você faz isso?
correctAnswer: I wanted to take a moment to acknowledge the excellent work you've done on the client presentation. Your analysis was particularly impressive.
options: I wanted to take a moment to acknowledge the excellent work you've done on the client presentation. Your analysis was particularly impressive.
Good job.
That was great work.
I liked what you did.

questionText: Você está treinando um novo membro da equipe que comete o mesmo erro repetidamente. Como você aborda isso construtivamente?
correctAnswer: I noticed you've struggled with this particular step a couple of times. Let me walk you through it again and we can practice together.
options: I noticed you've struggled with this particular step a couple of times. Let me walk you through it again and we can practice together.
You keep making the same mistake.
This is too difficult for you.
You need to pay better attention.

questionText: Você quer solicitar uma mudança de departamento ou projeto. Como você inicia essa conversa com seu gerente?
correctAnswer: I'd like to discuss a potential opportunity for growth within the company. Could we schedule a meeting to talk about transferring to another project?
options: I'd like to discuss a potential opportunity for growth within the company. Could we schedule a meeting to talk about transferring to another project?
I want to leave this department.
I'm not happy with my current position.
I need a change.

questionText: Durante uma ligação de conferência internacional, há uma desconexão. Como você verifica se todos ainda estão conectados?
correctAnswer: I think we lost the connection. Can everyone still hear me? Let me know if you're on the line.
options: I think we lost the connection. Can everyone still hear me? Let me know if you're on the line.
Hello? Hello? Is anyone there?
The call is down.
We have technical problems.

questionText: Você precisa definir limites profissionais com um colega que frequentemente pede favores pessoais. Como você comunica isso?
correctAnswer: I value our working relationship, but I need to focus on my current responsibilities. Let's keep our interactions work-focused.
options: I value our working relationship, but I need to focus on my current responsibilities. Let's keep our interactions work-focused.
Stop asking me for favors.
I'm not your friend outside of work.
Leave me alone.

questionText: Você está apresentando os resultados de um projeto que não atingiu todas as metas. Como você apresenta isso honestamente?
correctAnswer: While we didn't achieve all our targets, we made significant progress in several areas. Here's what we learned and how we'll apply it to future projects.
options: While we didn't achieve all our targets, we made significant progress in several areas. Here's what we learned and how we'll apply it to future projects.
The project failed.
We didn't do very well.
Everything went wrong.

questionText: Um cliente está considerando cancelar o contrato. Como você tenta salvaguardar a relação?
correctAnswer: I understand your concerns. I'd really appreciate the opportunity to discuss how we can better address your needs and find a solution that works for you.
options: I understand your concerns. I'd really appreciate the opportunity to discuss how we can better address your needs and find a solution that works for you.
You can't cancel now.
If you leave, you'll regret it.
There's nothing I can do about it.

questionText: Você precisa solicitar um aumento de salário. Como você faz essa solicitação assertiva mas profissional?
correctAnswer: Based on my contributions to the company and market research for my role, I believe a salary adjustment is warranted. Could we discuss this?
options: Based on my contributions to the company and market research for my role, I believe a salary adjustment is warranted. Could we discuss this?
I need more money.
I want a raise.
Everyone else earns more than me.

questionText: Você está em uma reunião onde seu trabalho é criticado indevidamente. Como você se defende profissionalmente?
correctAnswer: I appreciate your feedback. However, I'd like to clarify the facts here. The project was completed within budget and on schedule.
options: I appreciate your feedback. However, I'd like to clarify the facts here. The project was completed within budget and on schedule.
That's not true! You're wrong!
I did a great job and you know it.
You're just trying to blame me.

questionText: Você está mediando um conflito entre dois membros da equipe que têm opiniões muito diferentes. Como você começa a facilitação?
correctAnswer: I want us to understand each other's perspectives. Let's each take turns explaining our viewpoint without interruption, then we can find common ground.
options: I want us to understand each other's perspectives. Let's each take turns explaining our viewpoint without interruption, then we can find common ground.
One of you is wrong, so stop arguing.
Just agree with each other.
This conflict is pointless.

questionText: Você descobriu um problema ético significativo no seu departamento. Como você o reporta apropriadamente?
correctAnswer: I have concerns about a situation that may violate company policy. I'd like to discuss this with HR or management in a confidential setting.
options: I have concerns about a situation that may violate company policy. I'd like to discuss this with HR or management in a confidential setting.
There's something really wrong happening here.
You won't believe what I discovered.
I'm going to post this on social media.

questionText: Você está negociando um contrato importante com um parceiro estrangeiro. Como você busca esclarecimentos sobre termos conflitantes?
correctAnswer: I want to ensure we're aligned on this point. Could you clarify what you mean by 'deliverables'? I want to make sure we have matching expectations.
options: I want to ensure we're aligned on this point. Could you clarify what you mean by 'deliverables'? I want to make sure we have matching expectations.
I don't understand what you're saying.
Your terms don't work for us.
We need to change this agreement.

questionText: Você está apresentando para um conselho de diretores que pode questionar suas decisões. Como você se prepara para perguntas desafiadoras?
correctAnswer: That's an excellent question. The rationale behind that decision was based on market analysis and risk assessment. I'm happy to elaborate on the data.
options: That's an excellent question. The rationale behind that decision was based on market analysis and risk assessment. I'm happy to elaborate on the data.
I don't have to answer that.
That's just how we do things.
I made the best decision I could.

questionText: Você precisa informar um colega de longa data que ele será substituído como líder do projeto. Como você aborda essa conversa delicada?
correctAnswer: I wanted to discuss a change in project leadership. I value your contributions, but I think this transition will benefit the team.
options: I wanted to discuss a change in project leadership. I value your contributions, but I think this transition will benefit the team.
You're no longer the project lead.
Someone else is taking over.
You're not doing a good enough job.

questionText: Você está desenvolvendo um plano de estratégia competitiva e precisa convencer stakeholders sobre uma mudança de direção. Como você apresenta seu argumento?
correctAnswer: The market data suggests a shift in consumer behavior. I propose we adjust our strategy to capitalize on this opportunity. Here's the evidence and projected outcomes.
options: The market data suggests a shift in consumer behavior. I propose we adjust our strategy to capitalize on this opportunity. Here's the evidence and projected outcomes.
We need to change everything.
I think we should do something different.
Our current strategy isn't working.

questionText: Um cliente está fazendo demandas irrazoáveis que excederiam seu orçamento e cronograma. Como você comunica limites?
correctAnswer: I understand your needs, and we want to deliver excellent results. However, to maintain quality, these additional requirements would require either an extended timeline or an increased budget.
options: I understand your needs, and we want to deliver excellent results. However, to maintain quality, these additional requirements would require either an extended timeline or an increased budget.
We can't do all of that.
That's too much to ask.
It's impossible to do everything you want.

questionText: Você está procurando feedback de um gerente intimidador. Como você inicia essa conversa?
correctAnswer: I'd appreciate your perspective on my performance. I'm eager to understand where I can improve and what I'm doing well.
options: I'd appreciate your perspective on my performance. I'm eager to understand where I can improve and what I'm doing well.
Can you give me feedback?
I want to know what you think of my work.
Do you have any comments about me?

questionText: Você está liderando uma equipe multidisciplinar com perspectivas conflitantes sobre a direção do projeto. Como você cria consenso?
correctAnswer: I value each of your expertise. Let's focus on our shared goal and identify where our approaches align. What are the non-negotiable elements for each of you?
options: I value each of your expertise. Let's focus on our shared goal and identify where our approaches align. What are the non-negotiable elements for each of you?
Everyone just has to agree with the plan.
We're doing it my way.
Your disagreements are slowing us down.

questionText: Você está pedindo uma avaliação 360 graus antes de uma promoção. Como você faz esse pedido?
correctAnswer: Before considering a promotion, I'd like to gather feedback from my peers and colleagues. This would give me a comprehensive view of my impact on the team.
options: Before considering a promotion, I'd like to gather feedback from my peers and colleagues. This would give me a comprehensive view of my impact on the team.
I need people to tell you how good I am.
Ask around about how I'm doing.
Get feedback about me from everyone.

questionText: Você está encerrando um relacionamento com um cliente de longa data que não está mais alinhado com seus valores de negócio. Como você comunica isso com elegância?
correctAnswer: Thank you for our years of partnership. However, I believe our business directions have diverged. I think it would be best for both parties to part ways professionally.
options: Thank you for our years of partnership. However, I believe our business directions have diverged. I think it would be best for both parties to part ways professionally.
We're ending our relationship.
You're not a good client for us anymore.
We don't want to work with you.

questionText: Você está entrevistando candidatos e descobriu que o melhor candidato técnico tem habilidades de comunicação pobres. Como você avalia isso?
correctAnswer: Your technical skills are impressive. However, I'm concerned about communication abilities for this role. How do you approach developing this skill?
options: Your technical skills are impressive. However, I'm concerned about communication abilities for this role. How do you approach developing this skill?
You can't communicate well enough.
Your soft skills are too weak.
You're not right for this position.

questionText: Seu departamento está enfrentando cortes orçamentários e você precisa informar a equipe. Como você comunica essa notícia mantendo a moral?
correctAnswer: I need to be transparent about upcoming budget constraints. We'll need to be creative and efficient, but I'm confident in our team's ability to adapt.
options: I need to be transparent about upcoming budget constraints. We'll need to be creative and efficient, but I'm confident in our team's ability to adapt.
The budget is being cut. Sorry about that.
We don't have enough money.
Everything is getting worse financially.

questionText: Você está apresentando uma proposta de investimento significativo que carrega risco moderado. Como você equilibra transparência com confiabilidade?
correctAnswer: This investment presents significant growth opportunities, but I want to be clear about the associated risks. Here's my mitigation strategy and expected return timeline.
options: This investment presents significant growth opportunities, but I want to be clear about the associated risks. Here's my mitigation strategy and expected return timeline.
This is a great investment with no risks.
It's risky, but maybe it will work out.
You should invest. Trust me.

questionText: Você está delegando um projeto crítico a um membro da equipe que tem potencial mas é inexperiente. Como você oferece suporte e confiança?
correctAnswer: I'm giving you this project because I believe in your capabilities. I'll be here to support you. Let's define checkpoints where we can review progress.
options: I'm giving you this project because I believe in your capabilities. I'll be here to support you. Let's define checkpoints where we can review progress.
Try to do this project, but probably you'll fail.
Here's the project. Good luck.
If you mess this up, there will be consequences.

questionText: Você está saindo da empresa após muitos anos. Como você comunica sua partida mantendo relacionamentos positivos?
correctAnswer: I've decided to pursue a new opportunity. I'm grateful for the experiences and relationships I've built here. Let's ensure a smooth transition.
options: I've decided to pursue a new opportunity. I'm grateful for the experiences and relationships I've built here. Let's ensure a smooth transition.
I'm leaving and I'm done with this place.
I found a better job.
This company was holding me back.

questionText: Você está comunicando um fracasso importante de projeto a investidores. Como você reorienta a narrativa para a recuperação?
correctAnswer: While this project didn't meet our initial projections, we've pivoted our approach and are confident these learnings position us for stronger future performance.
options: While this project didn't meet our initial projections, we've pivoted our approach and are confident these learnings position us for stronger future performance.
The project failed completely and we lost a lot of money.
We made mistakes but we learned something from it.
Things didn't work out as planned and now we're doing something different.

questionText: Você está apresentando um caso de business para fechar uma aquisição. Como você estrutura o pitch final para convencer os board members?
correctAnswer: This acquisition aligns strategically with our five-year vision and offers immediate synergies that will accelerate our market position. The risk-adjusted return justifies the investment.
options: This acquisition aligns strategically with our five-year vision and offers immediate synergies that will accelerate our market position. The risk-adjusted return justifies the investment.
This company would be good to buy because we can work together.
Buying this company makes sense for our future growth and saves time.
We should acquire them because they fit with our business goals.
